reason.core_statement: Day 3 produced its divergence inside the running hypothesis: the feather actively cost alt YY the year's first ramp shoot, while main YY took the dig and gained the green. The existing alt1-with-feather branch is doing exactly the work it was created to do — adding a new branch on day 3 would dilute the running comparison without testing a new variable.

proposed_mutation.summary: No new branch — Day 3 strengthens the existing branch contrast by producing the first measured behavioral cost of the feather.
